title: echinops spinosissimus subsp. neumayeri
intro: Echinops spinosissimus subsp. neumayeri is a subspecies of the Echinops spinosissimus plant, commonly known as the "Globe Thistle", a prickly perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of East Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Echinops spinosissimus subsp. neumayeri include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, flu, and digestive issues.
